content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the 16 new integration tests added to tests/cli.rs. All tests compile, pass, and cover the scope specified by the bead (5 milestone tests, 3 task alias tests, 3 compatibility tests, 3 error handling tests, 2 output format tests). Verified all assertions against actual CLI output/error code at src/cli/milestone.rs, src/cli/task.rs, src/cli/project.rs, src/shared/error.rs, and src/contexts/workspace_governance/mod.rs. Fixture helpers are used correctly; each test has its own temp directory for isolation. `cargo clippy --test cli` and `cargo fmt --check` are clean. Pre-existing clippy errors in lib/unit tests are unrelated to this bead (ADDITIVE change did not touch any source code). No correctness, safety, or robustness issues found.

## Amendments

None.
